steps.name: Prepare a tape measure and notepad
steps.text: Use a rigid tape measure and record each dimension in millimetres. Measure from fixed cabinet edges, not from trim pieces.

steps.name: Measure cavity width
steps.text: Measure the internal cavity width at the front and the back, then use the smaller value. This prevents side-wall taper from being missed.

steps.name: Measure cavity height
steps.text: Measure from finished floor level to the underside of overhead cabinetry at both left and right sides, then keep the smaller value.

steps.name: Measure cavity depth
steps.text: Measure from the back wall to the cabinet front edge. Include any skirting, power point cover, or plumbing protrusion in the usable depth.

steps.name: Apply ventilation clearance before purchase
steps.text: Compare your cavity measurements against appliance dimensions plus manufacturer clearances for side, rear, and top ventilation.
